name: 7Artisans 50mm f/1.8 AF Lens
description: A convenient everyday prime lens designed for Nikon Z-mount full-frame mirrorless cameras, the 50mm f/1.8 AF Lens from 7artisans Photoelectric is ideal for capturing everything from portraits to landscapes at a standard focal length.

features.Key Features:: Full-Frame | f/1.8 to f/16 | Fast Aperture Everyday Prime | STM Stepping Motor | Two Aspherical Lens Elements | Multlayer Coatings | 11-Blade Diaphragm | AF/MF Mode Switch | USB Port for Firmware Upgrades
